GeneralDescription.SourceString: Step out of the shadows and stake your claim.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Step out of the shadows and stake your claim.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: The former lone agent is now an experienced heist crew leader, on the hunt for a new score. The Hotel is a promising target, if he can find a crew willing to tackle its elaborate defenses.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: The former lone agent is now an experienced heist crew leader, on the hunt for a new score. The Hotel is a promising target, if he can find a crew willing to tackle its elaborate defenses.
